title: Switch scaffold to apply plan; breakdown consumes the pre-created B
description:
Make `jit apply plan` the bracket scaffold and have breakdown consume the pre-created breakdown node — in one slice, so the workflow is never half-migrated.

Add the apply command; refactor breakdown to locate the existing breakdown node and reach the planning node through it (preserving the approved-plan precondition) against the new container → breakdown → planning shape; remove the old scaffold command and its create-time flag. Move the affected modules off the flat planning configuration.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] SCAFFOLD-01: `jit apply plan <container>` produces the planning and breakdown nodes and the bracket spine.
- [ ] [hard] SCAFFOLD-02: Breakdown locates the pre-created breakdown node and the approved planning node, and errors clearly when the bracket is absent.
- [ ] [hard] SCAFFOLD-03: The old scaffold command and flag are gone; affected tests are updated.
- [ ] [hard] SCAFFOLD-04: The bracket workflow builds and is green before and after this change.
